query:
-- Step 1: Tag retail offering customers based on billing item descriptions
UPDATE customers c
SET 
  customerType = 'retail_offering'
WHERE c.xeroContactName IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT contactName 
  FROM billing_items 
  WHERE description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied NBN%'
     OR description LIKE '%Site Bundle%'
     OR description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied mobile broadband%'
     OR description LIKE '%4G SIM Backup Internet Service%'
)
OR c.name IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT contactName 
  FROM billing_items 
  WHERE description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied NBN%'
     OR description LIKE '%Site Bundle%'
     OR description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied mobile broadband%'
     OR description LIKE '%4G SIM Backup Internet Service%'
);
